description: Real, locally-computed comparison of B0 (random), B1 (greedy MEF), and B2 (scripted heuristic) baselines against randomly-sampled RED best-responses, using the synthetic scenario generators in coageneration.data. No LLM calls were made for this run.

b3_llm_self_play.reason: Requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and network access; not run in this session. Run `python scripts/run_demo.py --llm` and `pytest tests/test_llm_policy.py` manually, then extend this script with a real B3/B4 + LLM-guided self-play comparison.

scenario_corpus_smoke_test.note: make_scenario_corpus() produces urban/maritime/multi-domain cases; not yet wired into this experiment's main loop.
